languages.text: "Да кто же знал, Ваше Благородие..." {n}Яруб обрывает сбивчивый поток оправданий на полуслове и опускает глаза в землю.{/n} "Вы правы. Слушаю".

traits.locale_text: "Да кто же знал, Ваше Благородие..." {n}Яруб обрывает сбивчивый поток оправданий на полуслове и опускает глаза в землю.{/n} "Вы правы. Слушаю".

languages.text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."
languages.original_text: "Да кто же знал, Ваше Благородие..." {n}Яруб обрывает сбивчивый поток оправданий на полуслове и опускает глаза в землю.{/n} "Вы правы. Слушаю".

traits.locale_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."
"Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."
"Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

languages.text: “谁能想得到呢，大人——”{n}雅鲁布那通语无伦次的辩解戛然而止，他低下头看着地面。{/n}“您说得对。请讲。”
languages.original_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

traits.locale_text: “谁能想得到呢，大人——”{n}雅鲁布那通语无伦次的辩解戛然而止，他低下头看着地面。{/n}“您说得对。请讲。”

languages.text: « Qui aurait pu le deviner, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}... {n}Jarub interrompt ses excuses confuses et baisse les yeux.{/n} Mais vous avez raison. Je vous écoute. »
languages.original_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

traits.locale_text: « Qui aurait pu le deviner, {mf|mon seigneur|ma dame}... {n}Jarub interrompt ses excuses confuses et baisse les yeux.{n} Mais vous avez raison. Je vous écoute. »

languages.text: "Kim tahmin edebilirdi ki {mf|lordum|leydim}..." {n}Jarub, kafası karışmış bir şekilde sunduğu bahaneleri yarıda kesip yere bakıyor.{/n} "Haklısınız. Sizi dinliyorum."
languages.original_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

traits.locale_text: "Kim tahmin edebilirdi ki {mf|lordum|leydim}..." {n}Jarub, kafası karışmış bir şekilde sunduğu bahaneleri yarıda kesip yere bakıyor.{/n} "Haklısınız. Sizi dinliyorum."

languages.text: «¿Quién se lo habría imaginado, mi {mf|señor|señora}?...». {n}Jarub interrumpe su confusa ristra de excusas y baja la mirada al suelo.{/n} «Tiene razón. L{mf|e|a} escucho».
languages.original_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

traits.locale_text: «¿Quién se lo habría imaginado, mi {mf|señor|señora}?...». {n}Jarub interrumpe su confusa ristra de excusas y baja la mirada al suelo.{/n} «Tiene razón. L{mf|e|a} escucho».

languages.text: "Wer hätte gedacht, {mf|Mylord|Mylady} ..." {n}Jarub beendet seinen wirren Schwall von Entschuldigungen und schaut auf den Boden.{/n} "Ihr habt recht. Ich höre Euch zu."
languages.original_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

traits.locale_text: "Wer hätte gedacht, {mf|Mylord|Mylady} ..." {n}Jarub beendet seinen wirren Schwall von Entschuldigungen und schaut auf den Boden.{/n} "Ihr habt recht. Ich höre Euch zu."

languages.text: 「まさか、まさか、私の主様」{n}ジャラブは混乱した言い訳の途中で言葉を切り、地面を見下ろす。{/n}「そうだな。聞いてるよ。」
languages.original_text: "Who could've guessed, my {mf|lord|lady}—" {n}Jarub breaks off from his confused stream of excuses and looks down at the ground.{/n} "You're right. I'm listening."

traits.locale_text: 「まさか、まさか、私の主様」{n}ジャラブは混乱した言い訳の途中で言葉を切り、地面を見下ろす。{/n}「そうだな。聞いてるよ。」
